text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I stop by the shopping district
on our way home.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Here it is. My favorite flower shop.
choice_data_list: Are you going to buy something?
Are you going to buy something?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Just a few flowers. The empty vase in the dorm
lobby is such a forlorn sight.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What's a flower vase without flowers? I figured I
could pick a few to brighten things up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think seeing them every day would help
to brighten everyone's spirits?
choice_data_list: I think that's a great idea.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've been very passionate about flower
arrangement, ever since I was little.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It feels wonderful that I get to continue my hobby
here too.
choice_data_list: I'd love to see it once you're finished.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, certainly. I'd like to share my interests with
you, after all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I know! Since you're here, why don't you try
arranging a vase too?
choice_data_list: Do you think I can pull it off?
Let's choose some to decorate my office.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Like other traditional arts, flower
arrangement is as much a philosophy as a skill.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The essence of such arts lies in the will to stay
true to one's own chosen path.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As long as you keep moving forward, you will
surely reach the goal you seek. That is the beauty
of these traditions.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. To tell you the truth, it's not all that
different from racing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's how I know you'll do just fine, Trainer. Let's
make something beautiful together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by Grass Wonder's words, I work with
her to pick out a selection of flowers.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's a lovely idea. Flowers are a wonderful
addition to anyone's daily life.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And with different blooms staggered throughout
the year, bouquets are an excellent way to enjoy
the ever-changing seasons.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You spend a fair amount of time in that office, so
we had best put a lot of thought into which
flowers to use.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I almost forgot about the vase in my dorm's
lobby. Hehehe. There's so much to think about. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder is practically walking on air as we
pick out flowers together.
